chunks.text: Ankur Aggarwal makes Forbes 30 Under 30 in healthcare - EECS at Berkeley Alumnus Ankur Aggarwal (EECS M.Eng.’12) has been named in Forbes magazine’s 30 Under 30 list, a compilation of the brightest young entrepreneurs, innovators and game changers across 20 industries. Ankur and his college roommates teamed up to found TowerView Health, which sells a smart pill box with custom trays of medication. Categories Alumni Entrepreneurship Honors Industry View Open Faculty Positions
